text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day after classes are over, I spot Nishino
Flower and some others studying in a classroom.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Biko, you see how the instructions here say,
"Solve for x"?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
What that means is that you need to rearrange
the equation so that the x is by itself on one side!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Um... Huuuh? Now I'm even more confused...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Like I said, the answer's x = 3!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But why is that the answer? And why did you
move x to the left side anyway?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's because... You can't get the answer if
you don't move it there.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
You're acting like you know everything, but you
don't get it either, do you?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I do too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: U-um... Hm, how should I explain it...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
We're doing our homework together, but I'm not
sure how to teach them in a way they'd
understand...
choice_data_list: Well, how did you understand it?
Well, how did you understand it?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I just followed what our teacher taught us in
class...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wait, that's it!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I always take notes on everything in class, so go
ahead and use them as reference!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, I see! The plus and minus get switched here!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
What, you mean we were just adding and
subtracting stuff this whole time?! This will be
easy peasy, then!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta say, though, your notes are awesome!
They're easier to understand than our teacher's
explanations!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Totally! You use different colors for different
stuff too. Just looking at these notes is fun. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You're exaggerating. All I did was listen to the
teacher and copy down what was on the board.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Nuh-uh! We're being totally serious! I write
everything down too, but my notes are all a big
mess. How do you do it?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: There's no trick to it, really.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I just make sure to write neatly so that anyone
can read them, not just me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Taking the time to write carefully is like doing my
future self a favor when I review the notes later
on.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wow! But I guess you did us a favor this time. ★

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, true. I'll have to keep taking
well-organized notes so that I can help everyone
out even more.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That settles it! The next time I don't get
something, I'll just take a peek at Flower's notes!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You can't just count on her for everything!
You have to study yourself, too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's fine by me. Be sure to let me know
whenever something has you stumped!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Everyone needs a helping hand now and then.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wow! ♪ You sounded so mature just now,
Flower! ★

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I did? Ehehehe, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I wouldn't have known what to do without
your advice, Trainer!
choice_data_list: It's your diligence that was the key.
It's your diligence that was the key.
I'm always here if you need me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But I wouldn't have known what to do without
your advice, Trainer!
choice_data_list: It's your diligence that was the key.
It's your diligence that was the key.
I'm always here if you need me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
D-do you really think so?! Wow! Hearing that just
made my day.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to study even harder from now on, just
you watch!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I've got to make sure I take thorough notes
tomorrow, too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Really? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But... I'd feel bad if I relied on you for everything.
All things in moderation, right?
choice_data_list:
You don't have to hold back. "Everyone needs a
helping hand now and then," right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Tehehe, thanks! Okay, I'll be counting on you,
then!
